title: zornia gibbosa
intro: Zornia gibbosa, also known as the hairy zornia, is a plant species belonging to the genus Zornia, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Its health benefits include the potential treatment of various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. Herbal preparations of Zornia gibbosa often involve the use of its leaves and stems, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
